entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species affected by sheath blight disease and used in the study.

entities.name: SHEATH BLIGHT DISEASE
entities.description: A devastating disease in rice caused by the fungal pathogen Rhizoctonia solani.

entities.name: RHIZOCTONIA SOLANI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing sheath blight disease in rice.

entities.name: THANATEPHORUS CUCUMERIS
entities.description: The teleomorph form of the fungal pathogen Rhizoctonia solani.

entities.name: TWO-DIMENSIONAL POLYACRYLAMIDE GEL ELECTROPHORESIS
entities.description: A technique used for proteome analysis to separate proteins.

entities.name: MASS SPECTROMETRY
entities.description: An analytical technique used to identify differentially expressed proteins.

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins that show significant differences in expression levels between tolerant and susceptible genotypes.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE PCR
entities.description: A laboratory technique used to analyze the expression levels of specific genes.

entities.name: PANKAJ
entities.description: A moderately tolerant rice genotype used in the study.

entities.name: MICRORNAS
entities.description: Small non-coding RNA molecules involved in post-transcriptional gene regulation.

entities.name: PROTEOMIC APPROACHES
entities.description: Study of the entire set of proteins expressed by a genome, proteome, or cell.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMIC APPROACHES
entities.description: Study of the transcriptome—the sum of all the RNA transcripts.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a rice genotype to withstand or limit the impact of sheath blight disease.

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The lack of resistance to sheath blight disease in certain rice genotypes.

entities.name: PHOTOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: A biological process associated with the function of identified differentially expressed proteins.

entities.name: PATHOGENESIS
entities.description: The process by which a disease develops, associated with identified differentially expressed proteins.

entities.name: STRESS
entities.description: The physiological state of the plant during infection by Rhizoctonia solani.

entities.name: CELL WALL METABOLISM
entities.description: Biological processes related to the synthesis and modification of the cell wall, associated with DEPs.

entities.name: CYTOSKELETON DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Biological processes related to the structural framework of the cell, associated with DEPs.

entities.name: POST-TRANSCRIPTIONAL GENE REGULATION
entities.description: The regulation of gene expression after transcription, mediated by miRNAs.
